violations.text: The handwashing sink in the kitchen was not in service (disconnected from water). New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The 3-bay sink, mop sink, hand sink in the kitchen and hand sink in the slime area were observed to be disconnected from the water. A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The following was observed of materials: 1) The walls in the ware-washing area is constructed of aluminum material. This material is not durable. 2) The wall at the kids sink in the slime area was observed to be on a painted wall. This material is not easily cleanable or non-absorbent. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024
